plugins.name: claude-cortex
plugins.description: Always-on learning system — Claude gets smarter about you with every conversation. Passively observes preferences, captures knowledge, and adapts.

plugins.name: bizdev-outreach
plugins.description: Research a contact and draft personalized business development outreach.

plugins.name: lead-engine
plugins.description: Turn your LinkedIn network into a warm-lead engine. Catches buying signals, warms prospects via comments and connection requests, drafts DMs in your voice, runs a 3-touch cadence, and generates pre-call briefs.

plugins.name: weekly-alignment
plugins.description: Weekly cross-team alignment scanner. Monitors Slack channels for overlapping initiatives, conflicting priorities, and decisions that affect other teams — then delivers a Monday morning brief.

plugins.name: core-ops
plugins.description: Generic business-ops toolkit. Pipeline Analyst (subagent) ranks your CRM pipeline by recency × signal × stage. Deliverable Reviewer (slash command) runs a structured QA pass on client decks/docs/spreadsheets against your brand guide. Configurable per user via /setup-core.

plugins.name: news-curator
plugins.description: Curate and draft a weekly LinkedIn news roundup. News Curator (subagent) scans newsletters and the open web for the week's most important stories ranked for your audience. Post Assembler (subagent) drafts the post in your voice. Configurable per user via /setup-news.

plugins.name: plan-tomorrow
plugins.description: Calendar-first daily planning. Pulls CRM tasks, working memory context, and inbox action items, then creates time blocks on your calendar with full context baked in. The calendar IS the plan. Delegates CRM scoring to pipeline-analyst (core-ops) when installed. Configurable per user via /setup-plan.

plugins.name: weekly-outreach
plugins.description: Weekly relationship management and BD prep. Pulls from CRM, email, and calendar; produces a prioritized outreach plan in chat plus CRM tasks and calendar placeholders. Delegates pipeline analysis to pipeline-analyst and per-contact research to contact-researcher when installed. Configurable per user via /setup-outreach.

plugins.name: project-setup
plugins.description: End-to-end client engagement initialization. Interviews you about a new engagement, then produces Drive folder structure, Claude Project system prompt, phased project plan with immediate next step, and a memory node (if claude-cortex is installed). Templates are user-customizable for your offerings. Configurable per user via /setup-projects.

plugins.name: time-tracking
plugins.description: Calendar-driven time tracking and monthly invoice generation. /track-time pulls calendar events, classifies billable time per client, logs to ~/Documents/Claude/time-log.csv. /generate-invoices reads the log, applies each client's billing model, drafts invoices ready for delivery. Closes the calendar-to-money loop. Configurable per user via /setup-time.
